name: example-html-ppt-zhangzara-peoples-platform
title: Html Ppt Zhangzara Peoples Platform
description: People's Platform (Block & Bold) — Activist poster energy: blue, orange, red on cream, with Alfa Slab + Caveat Brush. Anything that should feel honest, loud, and graphic: cultural commentary, manifestos, civic and community decks, design talks, campaign pitches.
